description:
You are working in Juris-M (Jurism), a legal reference manager. Your library contains 10 legal references: 7 US Supreme Court cases and 3 law review articles.

A collection named 'First Amendment Jurisprudence' has been created in the left sidebar panel. It contains exactly 2 cases:
- New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
- Tinker v. Des Moines Independent Community School District

Your task: Export ONLY the 'First Amendment Jurisprudence' collection to BibTeX format.

To do this, right-click on the 'First Amendment Jurisprudence' collection in the left panel and select 'Export Collection...'. In the export dialog, choose 'BibTeX' as the format. Save the exported file as:

  ~/Documents/first_amendment_refs.bib

IMPORTANT: Export only this specific collection, not the entire library. The resulting .bib file should contain only the 2 First Amendment cases, not all 10 references.
